name: system-design-skills
description: A divide-and-conquer wiki of system-design skills. Reason about a design problem one part at a time -- requirements, capacity, APIs, storage, caching, load balancing, messaging, consistency, resilience, delivery, and scaling -- each with generic recipes, cloud-provider variants (AWS/Azure/GCP/Temporal), explicit trade-offs, and failure-mode analysis. Optimizes for reasoning over memorized architectures.
